name: Landing Page
description: Marketing landing page with signup form, social proof, and conversion tracking.

prds.title: Landing Page & Conversion
prds.description: High-converting landing page targeting the ICP with clear value proposition.

use_cases.description: Above-the-fold hero section with headline, subheadline, CTA button, and hero image/demo.

acceptance_criteria: At least 3 testimonials or social proof elements

use_cases.description: Clear pricing tiers with feature comparison and CTA buttons.

use_cases.name: Conversion Tracking
